cards.short: A claim plus its support — the paragraph's version of subject + verb.
cards.detail:
Just as every sentence grows from a kernel of subject + verb, every paragraph grows from a kernel of claim + support. The future writing section will build paragraphs the way this site builds sentences: notice real paragraphs, name the moves, build your own, apply them in revision.

Proof of Architecture
This card is served by /data/writing/demo.json and rendered by the same cards component the sentence lessons use — no component changes were needed to add a new section.

cards.short: Paragraphs and longer forms: analytical, creative, personal.
cards.detail: Planned lessons follow the same Notice → Name → Build → Apply arc at paragraph scale: paragraph unity as a craft choice, transitions as joining moves (the paragraph-level cousins of Lesson 06), and revision studios for analytical, creative, and personal writing. Content will live in /data/writing/ and reuse the shared components untouched.
